footer_tagline: Free school lunch planner for Australian families.
about_subtitle: Making school lunches easier, healthier, and stress-free for Australian families.
about_intro: Welcome to Aussie Lunchbox Planner, your trusted partner in simplifying school mornings for Australian families.
about_mission1: We understand the daily challenge of packing lunchboxes that are nutritious, affordable, and actually eaten by kids. Our mission is to empower parents with automated, balanced meal plans that reduce decision fatigue and food waste.
about_mission2: Founded by a team of parents and tech enthusiasts in Sydney, we combine local supermarket data with kid-approved recipes to bring you a seamless planning experience.
about_feat1_desc: Generate a complete weekly plan in seconds. Say goodbye to the morning rush and hello to organized, stress-free starts to your day.
about_feat2_desc: We prioritize seasonal ingredients accessible in AU supermarkets to help you reduce food miles and minimize waste.
about_feat3_desc: Our algorithms ensure a mix of protein, fresh produce, and treats, aligned with Australian Dietary Guidelines for active kids.
about_community_desc: We are constantly improving based on your feedback. Together, let's make healthy eating the easy choice for our kids.
about_team_desc: We're not a faceless content farm. Aussie Lunchbox was started in Sydney by parents who were tired of googling the same lunchbox ideas every Sunday night. Everyone involved has school-age children in Australia.
about_editorial_desc: Everything we publish goes through a consistent review process. Here's exactly how we work.
about_important_title: Important: what Aussie Lunchbox is not
contact_subtitle: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question, feedback, or a partnership inquiry.
contact_desc: If you have any questions about our meal plans, recipes, or how to use the planner, please drop us a message.
contact_support_tip: 💡 For technical support, please include your browser version and a screenshot if possible.

faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about Aussie Lunchbox Planner.
faq_still_desc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Send us a message — we'd love to help.
faq_q1: Is Aussie Lunchbox Planner free to use?
faq_a1: Yes! The core weekly planner — generating meal plans, viewing recipes, and downloading shopping lists — is completely free. We may introduce premium features in the future, but the essentials will always remain free.
faq_q2: How does the meal plan generator work?
faq_a2: Our planner selects a balanced mix of 5 lunch menus for the week from our curated database of AU-friendly recipes. It prioritises variety across categories (Sandwich, Hot, Baking, Cold) and applies any allergy or dietary filters you've set.
faq_q3: Can I filter for allergies or dietary requirements?
faq_a3: Yes. Before generating your plan, you can select from the following filters: Nut Allergy, Dairy Allergy, Gluten Allergy, Egg Allergy, Vegetarian, and Vegan. The planner will exclude any menus that contain those allergens.
faq_a4: We take allergy safety seriously and have carefully tagged every recipe in our database. However, we cannot guarantee that commercial products you buy are free from allergens — manufacturers change formulations and cross-contamination can occur. Always read the label on every product you purchase.
faq_q5: Where do the supermarket prices come from?
faq_a5: Price estimates are based on regular Woolworths AU prices, updated periodically. Prices are approximations and may differ at your local store or on sale days. Coles and ALDI prices may vary.
faq_a6: Calorie estimates are based on standard portion sizes and average nutritional values from generic food databases. They are rough estimates intended to give a ballpark idea of energy content.
faq_q7: Can I save or favourite meal plans?
faq_a7: Yes, if you create a free account (sign in with Google), you can save favourite meal plans to revisit later.
faq_q8: Can I download the shopping list?
faq_a8: Yes! Once your weekly plan is generated, you can download a PDF of the shopping list, grouped by category with estimated prices.
faq_q9: Is the app suitable for schools with nut-free policies?
faq_a9: Yes. Enable the 'Nut Allergy' filter and the planner will only suggest nut-free menus.
faq_q10: What languages does the app support?
faq_a10: Aussie Lunchbox Planner supports English, Korean (한국어), and Chinese (中文). Use the language selector in the top navigation bar to switch.
faq_q11: Can I suggest new recipes or report an error?
faq_a11: Absolutely! We'd love your feedback. Use our Contact page to send us recipe suggestions, report incorrect allergy tags, or flag any issues.
faq_q12: How do I use the fridge leftovers feature?
faq_a12: In the Planner sidebar, you'll find a 'Fridge Leftovers' field. Type in an ingredient you already have (e.g., 'chicken', 'spinach'), and the planner will prioritise menus that use that ingredient.
faq_q13: Does the app work on mobile?
faq_a13: Yes. Aussie Lunchbox Planner is fully responsive and works on smartphones and tablets.
faq_a14: We review and add new recipes regularly, typically monthly. Supermarket prices are refreshed weekly.

policies_subtitle: Your trust and safety are our top priorities.
privacy_intro: At Aussie Lunchbox Planner, we are committed to protecting your privacy.
privacy_1_li1: When you sign up, we may collect your name and email address.
privacy_1_li2: We may collect anonymous data on how you use the app to improve our service.

privacy_2_li1: To provide and maintain the Service.

privacy_2_li3: To communicate with you regarding updates or support.

privacy_4_p: We use Google Analytics 4 to collect anonymous usage statistics. IP anonymisation is enabled. You can opt out using the
privacy_5_p: We also use Supabase for authentication and database storage, and Resend for transactional emails. We do not sell your personal data to advertisers.

disclaimer_warning: Please Read Carefully: The Aussie Lunchbox Planner is a tool designed to assist with meal planning and grocery organization. The content provided is for informational purposes only.
disclaimer_1_p: Always consult with a qualified healthcare professional or nutritionist before making drastic changes to your diet.
disclaimer_2_li1: While we provide filters for common allergens, we cannot guarantee that any recipe is completely free of allergens.
disclaimer_2_li2: Manufacturers may change ingredient formulations at any time.
disclaimer_2_li3: Check every label of the actual products you buy.
disclaimer_2_li4: Cross-contamination can occur in your own kitchen; you are responsible for safe food preparation.
disclaimer_3_li1: Nutritional values are automatic estimates based on generic databases.
disclaimer_3_li2: Price estimates are based on average supermarket prices in Australia and are subject to change without notice.
disclaimer_footer: By using this application, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this disclaimer and agree to use the information at your own risk.
cookie_message: We use cookies to improve your experience and to display relevant ads via Google AdSense. By clicking "Accept", you consent to our use of cookies.

blog_subtitle: Practical advice, healthy recipes, and inspiration for AU school lunches.
blog_count: 19 guides covering recipes, allergy-safe meals, budget tips, and AU seasonal produce — written for Aussie families.
blog_cta_desc: Use our free planner to generate a week of healthy lunches in seconds.
home_hero_desc: Generate a personalised 5-day school lunch plan for your kids in seconds — with allergy filters, Woolworths & Coles prices, and a printable shopping list.
home_feat_scheduling_desc: Generate a balanced 5-day plan in one click. Allergy filters, excluded ingredients, and fridge leftovers all factored in automatically.
home_feat_nutrition_desc: Meals are balanced around protein, fresh produce, and wholegrains — aligned with Australian Dietary Guidelines.
home_feat_shopping_desc: Get a categorised shopping list with Woolworths & Coles price estimates. Download as PDF or email to yourself before you shop.
home_step1_desc: Choose allergy restrictions (nut-free, dairy-free, gluten-free, vegan), exclude specific ingredients, or add what's already in the fridge.
home_step2_desc: Hit Generate and get a full 5-day school lunch plan with recipes, ingredient lists, and estimated costs — in about 5 seconds.
home_step3_desc: Download a categorised shopping list as PDF or email it to yourself. Everything organised by supermarket aisle — dairy, produce, pantry.
home_usecase1_desc: Open the planner on Sunday, hit Generate, and you're sorted before the kids' bedtime. No Monday morning scramble, no forgotten lunchbox.
home_usecase2_desc: Select nut-free, dairy-free, gluten-free, or vegan — every meal in the generated plan respects your filters. No manual ingredient checking.
home_usecase3_desc: Woolworths and Coles price estimates are built in. See your full weekly lunchbox cost before you shop.
